title: I want writing to bring me success financially and critically
content:
I want writing to bring me success financially and critically
I want writing to help me get out ideas
I want writing to help cleanse me

Long term goals are to get my MET4 published and to write my own television show
Short term goals are to publish smaller pieces of MET4 to gain attention and work on creating a portfolio of original content for our YouTube channel
I’m lazy, suffer from mood swings, but I will be the tortoise, slow and steady.

I want to write when I want to write
I want to be paid well and highly for my writing
I want to work only when I want to work
I want to be multidisciplinary, and be valued in all the fields in which I work
I want to be respected
I do not want to work a 9-5, i do not want to serve anyone but myself. I want to take care of my family, my peers, and my art.

I need to grow all of my skills, and stop wasting time on habits that do not benefit me and my goals.
context: From document: I want writing to bring me success financially and critically
